command: echo '=== Check GitHub Actions status ===' && cd /root/MT5-PropFirm-Bot && git log --oneline -5 && echo '=== Check if workflow created any artifacts ===' && curl -s -H 'Accept: application/vnd.github+json' 'https://api.github.com/repos/motitap-dotcom/MT5-PropFirm-Bot/actions/runs?per_page=5&branch=claude/claude-md-mm3qa8i9848jcovk-X3DTU' 2>&1 | python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load(sys.stdin); runs=data.get('workflow_runs',[]); [print(f\"Run #{r['run_number']}: {r['status']} / {r.get('conclusion','pending')} - {r['name']} ({r['created_at']})\") for r in runs[:5]]" 2>&1 || echo 'API check failed' && echo '=== Check .ex5 on VPS ===' && ls -la '/root/.wine/drive_c/Program Files/MetaTrader 5/MQL5/Experts/PropFirmBot/PropFirmBot.ex5' 2>/dev/null || echo 'No .ex5 yet'
